title: Predictive Asset Loading
description: Architect strategies for predictive asset loading to improve user experience. Implement techniques such as "Hover-to-Preload" and "Intersection-based" chunk fetching to reduce perceived latency.
objectives: Architect strategies for predictive asset loading to improve user experience.
Implement techniques such as "Hover-to-Preload" and "Intersection-based" chunk fetching to reduce perceived latency.
